title: hieracium vulgatum f. subravusculum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum f. subravusculum, also known as a variety of the lesser hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium vulgatum f. subravusculum can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
